tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose metabolism or possible prediabetes, and elevated LDL cholesterol, which increases cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and lipid management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
